project_type: Nx monorepo with Angular frontend, CDK infrastructure, and Lambda API
test_framework: No test files present in the repo currently
verification_instructions: Build the infra app with `pnpm nx build infra` to ensure TypeScript compiles correctly
key_patterns: CDK stack in apps/infra/src/stacks/recipe-manager-stack.ts defines all infrastructure. Lambda handler in apps/api/src/handler.ts uses Bedrock InvokeModel with modelId 'eu.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0' which is a cross-region inference profile.
directory_structure: apps/api - Lambda handler, apps/infra - CDK stack, apps/web - Angular frontend, libs/shared - shared types
